name: the four from Thorne
identity: A faction of trackers from Thorne who have formally accepted a lineage tie to the Quiet Weave. They have chosen to return to their home tribe with the explicit intent of bringing more people to the settlement, serving as a living testament to its promise.
current_status: Departing for Thorne to recruit their people, having completed their integration ceremony and accepted their new role as bridges between the tribes.

status.value: Formally integrated, returning to home tribe with mission

volatile_state.current_activity: Departing for Thorne to begin recruitment mission
